titulos.subtitulo: Choose the option that matches your issue

problemas.descricao: Axis lock interrupted the Auto Setup. The system requires manual release of the rotary valve.
problemas.solucao: Force the axis manually with a wrench. Ensure a rotation greater than 30° to confirm the release.

problemas.descricao: Parameter modification without opening the equipment cover, respecting the area's safety restrictions.
problemas.solucao: Use the magnetic key on B1 for 3s for the Offline menu. Navigate with short taps on B3 and save on B2.

problemas.descricao: Advanced diagnostics via mobile app. It is necessary to activate the wireless module on the M4.Smart display.
problemas.solucao: Activate Bluetooth in the local menu. Approach the smartphone and confirm pairing on the screen.

problemas.descricao: Position error due to continuous line vibration, which loosened the NAMUR bracket screws.
problemas.solucao: Check the alert on the display. Use an Allen wrench to retighten the axis bracket screws.

problemas.descricao: Motor stopped due to high torque. Indicates locking by obstruction in the pipe or valve seal failure.
problemas.solucao: Inspect the pipe and valve. Remove any physical obstruction to release the mechanical assembly.

problemas.descricao: Low pneumatic pressure alert. A leak in the 1/4 NPT connections is depressurizing the system.
problemas.solucao: Identify the leaking port. Use an open-end wrench to retighten the loose metal connection.

problemas.descricao: Loss of 4-20mA signal with the PLC. Could be broken wiring or power supply failure.
problemas.solucao: Open the equipment's electrical compartment. Use a multimeter to test the voltage on the internal terminals.

problemas.descricao: Operational cycles limit reached alert. The cycle counter requires a reset for a new service life.
problemas.solucao: After physical maintenance, access the menu. Select the 'Cycle Reset' option and confirm to clear the alert.
